name: Cottage Cheese Pancakes (Blender Method)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except milk in a blender and process at medium speed until smooth.
2. Gradually add milk while continuing to blend until the batter reaches a consistency similar to medium-thick pancake batter.
3. Heat a lightly greased skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
4. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the skillet for each pancake.
5. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and the edges start to look set, then flip and cook the other side until browned.
6. Serve hot with fresh fruit, jam, hot applesauce, or butter topped with cinnamon-sugar.
Makes about 25 medium-sized pancakes.
